name: Washington
overview: The story of how a fatherless young soldier full of personal ambition becomes a leader of men willing to sacrifice all for the common cause. How a once-loyal British subject rises to battle an empire in a liberty-or-death campaign to forge a new nation. And then how, at the zenith of his power, the victorious general voluntarily steps down, becoming what King George III would call “the greatest man in the world.”

trailers.title: Washington: Official Trailer | Three-Night Miniseries Event Premieres Feb. 16 @ 8/7c | History
